Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPPEDIDOSORDEM', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &TipoCredito = 'S' &StatusProducao = 'T' &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'CarregaFiltros' SelecionaPedidoProducao.Call('', &EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao) EndEvent Event Grid.Load //se mudar filtro aqui mudar no marca/desmarca &AuxGrupHie = &GrupHie.trim() + '.' //Pendente Produção:A, Selecionado Produção:B, Produzindo/Produzido:C, Pendente/Selecionado:D, Todos os Pedidos:T For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod when &StatusProducao <> 'B' Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedDtaHorSelPrd, PedCod when &StatusProducao = 'B' Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FiLCod Where PedCod = &PedCod Or &PedCod = 0 Where (PedDtaEms >= &PedDtaEms and PedDtaEms <= &PedDtaEms_to) Or &PedCod <> 0 Where (PedSts = &PedSts or &PedSts.IsEmpty()) or &PedCod <> 0 Where (PedNovStsCod = &PedStsCod or &PedStsCod.IsEmpty()) or &PedCod <> 0 // Where (PedNovStsFinCod = &PedStsFinCod or &PedStsFinCod.IsEmpty()) or &PedCod <> 0 Where (PedNovStsFinNom.Trim() = 'AUTORIZ.' or PedNovStsFinNom.Trim() = 'AUT.PGTO' or PedNovStsFinNom = 'AUTORIZ.P') when &TipoCredito = 'S' Where (PedNovStsFinNom.Trim() <> 'AUTORIZ.' and PedNovStsFinNom.Trim() <> 'AUT.PGTO' and PedNovStsFinNom <> 'AUTORIZ.P') when &TipoCredito = 'N' Where LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda or LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria Where PedBlq = Status_SimNao.Nao Where LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() or PedStsPrd.IsNull()) when &StatusProducao = 'A' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila) when &StatusProducao = 'B' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Produzido or PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.EmProducao) when &StatusProducao = 'C' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila or (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() or PedStsPrd.IsNull())) when &StatusProducao = 'D' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() or PedStsPrd.IsNull()) or (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila) or (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Produzido or PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.EmProducao) when &StatusProducao = 'T' &IsTem = true If (not &SetCod.IsEmpty()) or (not &GrupHie.IsEmpty()) &IsTem = false For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where (GrupHie = &GrupHie or GrupHie like &AuxGrupHie) when not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() Where ProSetCod = &SetCod when not &SetCod.IsEmpty() Where PedQtd > 0 &IsTem = true Exit EndFor Endif if &IsTem = true &gridEmpCod = EmpCod &gridFilCod = FilCod &gridPedCod = PedCod &gridLctCod = LctCod &gridPedCliCodRaz = PedCliCodRaz &gridPedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &gridPedDtaEms = PedDtaEms &gridPedStsPrd = PedStsPrd /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Seleciona.FromImage(SelectRow) &Seleciona.TooltipText = "" &AlterarStatus.FromImage(ActionCancel) &AlterarStatus.TooltipText = "Alterar Status" &iconImprimir = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &NovoStatus = trim(PedNovStsNom) prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &NovoStatusFin = trim(PedNovStsFinNom) prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatusFin.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &Seleciona.Visible = 1 Do CAse CAse PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila &Seleciona.FromImage(ActionDelete) &Seleciona.TooltipText = "Remover da Seleção" &Status = 'SELECIONADO PRODUÇÃO' &Status.ForeColor = RGB(0,153,51) CAse (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Produzido or PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.EmProducao) &Seleciona.Visible = 0 &Status = upper(PedStsPrd.EnumerationDescription()) &Status.ForeColor = RGB(0,40,160) Case PedNovStsFinNom <> 'AUTORIZ.' and PedNovStsFinNom <> 'AUT.PGTO' and PedNovStsFinNom <> 'AUTORIZ.P' &Status = 'CREDITO NAO AUTORIZADO!' &Status.ForeColor = RGB(178,0,0) Otherwise &Seleciona.FromImage(selectRow) &Seleciona.TooltipText = "Selecionar para Produção" &Status = 'PENDENTE PRODUÇÃO' &Status.ForeColor = RGB(178,0,0) EndCase load EndiF EndFor EndEvent Event 'DoMarca' &AuxGrupHie = &GrupHie.trim() + '.' if &OqueFazer = 'ADD' &OqueFazer = 'DEL' Else &OqueFazer = 'ADD' EndiF For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FiLCod Where PedCod = &PedCod Or &PedCod = 0 Where (PedDtaEms >= &PedDtaEms and PedDtaEms <= &PedDtaEms_to) Or &PedCod <> 0 Where (PedSts = &PedSts or &PedSts.IsEmpty()) or &PedCod <> 0 Where (PedNovStsCod = &PedStsCod or &PedStsCod.IsEmpty()) or &PedCod <> 0 Where (PedNovStsFinNom.Trim() = 'AUTORIZ.' or PedNovStsFinNom.Trim() = 'AUT.PGTO' or PedNovStsFinNom <> 'AUTORIZ.P') Where LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda or LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria Where PedBlq = Status_SimNao.Nao Where LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() or PedStsPrd.IsNull()) when &StatusProducao = 'A' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila) when &StatusProducao = 'B' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Produzido or PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.EmProducao) when &StatusProducao = 'C' Where (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() or PedStsPrd.IsNull()) or (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila) or (PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Produzido or PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.EmProducao) when &StatusProducao = 'T' &IsTem = true If (not &SetCod.IsEmpty()) or (not &GrupHie.IsEmpty()) &IsTem = false For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where (GrupHie = &GrupHie or GrupHie like &AuxGrupHie) when not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() Where ProSetCod = &SetCod when not &SetCod.IsEmpty() Where PedQtd > 0 &IsTem = true Exit EndFor Endif if &IsTem = true If PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila or PedStsPrd.IsNull() or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() SelecionaPedidoProducao.Call(&OqueFazer, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao) EndIF EndiF EndFor Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoGerarOrdem' prcSelecionaPedidosProducao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, '', &OrdCod) &DataHoje = serverDate() &DataHora = serverTime() CarregaSdtProducaoPedido.Call('P', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &OrdCod , Definicao.FABRICADO, 2, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao, &sdtOrdemProducao, &newProSetCod) GravaOrdemProducaoNovoPedidos.Call('P', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtOrdemProducao, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao, &DataHoje, &DataHora, &DataHoje, &DataHora, &OrdCod, &newProSetCod, '') wpQuantidadesAProduzir.Link('WPPEDIDOSORDEM', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &OrdCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraORdens' WWLancamentoOrdemProducaoPedido.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAlterarStatusGeral' &sdtPedidos.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO &sdtPedidosItem = new() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &sdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndFOr &WebSession.Set('PEDIDOORDEMALTERAR', &sdtPedidos.ToJson()) if &sdtPedidos.Count > 0 wpAlterarProduzindo.Popup(0, 0, 0) Refresh EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh If &PedDtaEms_to.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_to = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_to - 7 EndIF do 'SalvaFiltros' ContaPEdidosSelecionados.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &QuantosPedidos) PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(toformattedString(&QuantosPedidos)) + ' - Pedidos Selecionados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click do 'LimpaTodosSelecionados' Refresh EndEvent Event &Seleciona.Click Do Case Case &gridPedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila SelecionaPedidoProducao.Call('DEL', &gridEmpCod, &gridFilCod, &gridPedCod, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao) Case &gridPedStsPrd = Status_Producao.Aguardando or (&gridPedStsPrd <> Status_Producao.Produzido and &gridPedStsPrd <> Status_Producao.EmProducao) SelecionaPedidoProducao.Call('ADD', &gridEmpCod, &gridFilCod, &gridPedCod, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao) EndCase Refresh EndEvent Event &iconImprimir.Click wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(&gridEmpCod, &gridFilCod, &gridPedCod) EndEvent Event &AlterarStatus.Click &WebSession.Remove('PEDIDOORDEMALTERAR') wpAlterarProduzindo.Popup(&gridEmpCod, &gridFilCod, &gridPedCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &PedDtaEms_to.IsValid do 'SalvaFiltros' EndEvent Sub 'LimpaTodosSelecionados' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO Where PedStsPrd = Status_Producao.NaFila //or PedStsPrd.IsNull() or PedStsPrd.IsEmpty() AtualizaStatusProducaoPedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, Status_Producao.Aguardando, &VaziaData, &PedDtaHorSelPrd) EndFor EndSub Sub 'CarregaFiltros' &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) // Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" // &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) // Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" // &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSCOD" &PedStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFINCOD" &PedStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSPROD" &StatusProducao.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SETCOD" &SetCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"GRUPHIE" &GrupHie.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage EndSub Sub 'SalvaFiltros' &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() // If not &PedCod.IsEmpty() // &GridStateFilterValue = new() // &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" // &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &PedCod.ToString() // &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) // EndIf If not &PedSts.IsEmpty() &GridStateFilterValue = new() &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &PedSts.ToString() &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) EndIf // If not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty() // &GridStateFilterValue = new() // &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" // &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &PedStsFin.ToString() // &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) // EndIf // If not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty() // &GridStateFilterValue = new() // &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" // &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &PedCliCod.ToString() // &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) // EndIf If not &PedStsCod.IsEmpty() &GridStateFilterValue = new() &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSCOD" &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &PedStsCod.ToString() &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) EndIf If not &StatusProducao.IsEmpty() &GridStateFilterValue = new() &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSPROD" &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &StatusProducao.ToString() &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) EndIf If not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()) &GridStateFilterValue = new() &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &PedDtaEms.ToString() &GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo = &PedDtaEms_To.ToString() &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) EndIf If not &SetCod.IsEmpty() &GridStateFilterValue = new() &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SETCOD" &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &SetCod.ToString() &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) EndIf If not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() &GridStateFilterValue = new() &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"GRUPHIE" &GridStateFilterValue.Value = &GrupHie.Trim() &GridState.FilterValues.Add(&GridStateFilterValue) EndIf &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) EndSub
